sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Now I have a clearer picture of level 2:
- Left panel: 4 horizontal black buttons (cols 7, 12, 17, 22) + 4 vertical gray buttons (cols 8, 13, 18, 23)
- Right panel: 4 horizontal gray buttons (cols 38, 43, 48, 53) + 4 vertical gray buttons (cols 39, 44, 49, 54)
- Left panel has a target shape (dark charcoal on gray background)
- Right panel has 2 yellow shapes on a checkerboard
- Bottom has 2 icon boxes (blue and gray) and a blue blob
The left panel buttons are all black (B), while the right panel buttons are all gray (w). This is the opposite of level 1 where I needed to set all buttons to black.
For level 1, the solution was: set all buttons to black, then click blue blob.
For level 2, maybe the solution is similar: set all right panel buttons to black (matching the left panel), then click the blue blob.
But wait, there are also vertical buttons. In level 1, I set both horizontal and vertical buttons to black. Here, the left panel has horizontal buttons black and vertical buttons gray. So maybe I need to match that pattern on the right panel: horizontal buttons black, vertical buttons gray.
Let me try: set all 4 right panel horizontal buttons to black (they're currently gray), keep vertical buttons gray, then click the blue blob.
Right panel horizontal buttons are at cols 38, 43, 48, 53 (row 33).

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try setting right panel horizontal buttons to black (matching left panel pattern)
# Left panel: horizontal=B, vertical=w
# Right panel: horizontal=w, vertical=w
# Set right panel horizontal to B, keep vertical as w, then click blue blob

action([
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 39},  # Toggle right horizontal button 1
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 44},  # Toggle right horizontal button 2
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 49},  # Toggle right horizontal button 3
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 54},  # Toggle right horizontal button 4
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 55, 'col': 55}   # Click blue blob
])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
